name: rabbit-feature
summary: Owns the rabbit-feature-touch orchestration skill that gates every write/edit/delete/add operation targeting a feature directory through the formal TDD state machine. Dispatcher-side surface; the executor-side surface (tdd-step.py, dispatch-tdd-subagent.py, the 9-step cycle) lives in tdd-subagent.
deprecation_criterion: When feature-touch orchestration is natively handled by the rabbit CLI or by Claude Code's native workflow mechanism.
spec_no_change_reason: spec already committed by dispatcher per rabbit-feature-touch Step 3 (Inv 16); HEAD includes the spec edit
